summary: Corpus shows reinforced design-system discipline across 24 sessions; one redundant rule subsumed by another; one new pattern emerged around compact spacing.

proposals.proposed_content: Stale rule never reinforced in 6 weeks; superseded by silo-sw-design-system. Archive.

phrasing_examples: use the design system not custom CSS
source_evidence.reasoning: Corpus has 12 reinforcing prompts for silo-sw-design-system and zero reinforcement for the older rule.

proposals.proposed_content: Always use components. Every UI element is a reusable component instance. If a needed component does not exist, create it in the library first.

source_evidence.reasoning: Three sessions reinforce the create-first-then-consume pattern; previous wording was ambiguous.

proposals.proposed_content: Always restart porter-fastify after frontend rebuild. Backend serves statics; rebuild without restart = blank screen.

source_evidence.reasoning: Two sessions ran into the served-stale-bundle trap; pattern is consistent.
